entities.name: Fundraising Exhaustion
entities.context: Team exhausted after multiple fundraising cycles over three years; limited appetite for another major raise

entities.name: Burn Reduction
entities.context: Near-term goal to shrink burn rate by cutting to founders-only team while maintaining sustainable salaries

entities.name: Exit Process

entities.name: Founders-Only Team
entities.context: Target organizational structure during exit—founders only with sustainable salaries

relationships.context: Exhaustion from fundraising drives priority to shrink burn rather than raise again
Reducing burn is the financial strategy during exit
Cutting to founders-only is the mechanism to achieve burn reduction
